title: Started Python Development
description: Began writing the Python interpreter during a Christmas holiday week as a hobby coding project.

title: Released Python 0.9.0
description: Released the first public version of Python, featuring exception handling, functions, and object-oriented programming.

title: Released Python 2.0
description: Released Python 2.0, introducing key features like list comprehensions, garbage collection, and Unicode support.

title: Released Python 3.0
description: Released Python 3.0, a major, backward-incompatible release designed to remove code duplicates and clean language redundancy.

title: Stepped Down as BDFL
description: Stepped down as Python's 'Benevolent Dictator for Life' (BDFL), transitioning language governance to a Steering Council.
